positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a crescent moon embraced by stylized celestial flora, incorporating abstract constellations and gentle cosmic dust trails. The composition should be perfectly centered, featuring clean, distinct silhouettes and flowing lines. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blues, matte gold foil accents, and gentle teal accents. Highly suitable for screen printing or high-quality apparel transfer. Flat design aesthetic with a subtle gradient depth for celestial elements. Focus on strong contrast and symmetry, maximizing negative space for print appeal. Concept of quiet mystery and wonder.
